rulings.Case Title: PAUL EDGAR GORDON JR et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Dismiss Or Stay Action For Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MAY 21, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT LESLIE CONTROLS, INC.'S MOTION To Dismiss Or Stay Action For Forum Non Conveniens IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO CARRY BURDEN OF PROOF UNDER BOTH HANSEN AND AMERICAN CEMWOOD. THERE ARE THIRTY-NINE DEFENDANTS AND ONLY SIXTEEN HAVE BEEN SHOWN TO BE IN ARIZONA. THERE ARE SUBSTANTIAL CONTACTS WITH BOTH STATES AND WITNESSES IN BOTH STATES. TRANSFER WOULD SEVERELY PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S HEALTH. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: MIREYA GARCIA et al VS. OSCAR PEREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MAY 21, 2007, LINE 11. DEFENDANTS OSCAR PEREZ, CHRISTINA PEREZ AND OSCAR PEREZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. 1. DEMURRER TO FIRST AND NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUSTAINED FOR UNCERTAINTY. LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TWENTY DAYS IS GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT PLAINTIFF MAY BE ALLEGING SEPARATE WRONGS BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINTS ABOUT THE PROPERTY AND DEFENDANT'S STEPS TO REMOVE THE PROPERTY UNDER THE ELLIS ACT. DEMURRERS FOR FAILURE TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION ARE OVERRULED. THE FILING OF AN ELLIS ACT NOTICE, IN AND OF ITSELF, IS NOT NECESSARILY A PART OF THE LITIGATION PROCESS BECAUSE IT IS MEANT TO BE A SELF-EXECUTING STATUTE. WHETHER A NOTICE MAY BE A BASIS FOR RETALIATION IS A QUESTION OF FACT UNDER DROUET VERSUS SUPERIOR COURT (2003) 31 CAL. 4TH 583. 2. DEMURRERS TO THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA LUZI et al VS. 1905 LAGUNA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOMERS' et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MAY 21, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANTS 1905 LAGUNA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS', MARK TANGARD, STEVE BARTHOLOMEW AND JOHN KEATING'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. 1. OVERRULED AS TO THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED AN ON GOING CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATION. SEE ROMANO VERSUS ROCKWELL INTERNATIONAL INC., 14 CAL. 4TH 479, 489 (1996). 2. OVERRULED AS TO FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION. NEGLIGENCE ALLEGED TO BE ON GOING AND DISTINCT EVENTS. AT BEST, ONLY PART OF THE CLAIM IS BARRED. 3. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE TENTH AND ELEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE FACTS RELATED TO DEFENDANTS' BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.15 DOOES APPLY TO THE ASSOCIATION. 4. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION. CIVIL CODE SECTION 1941 IS INAPPLICABLE; CIVIL CODE SECTION 1964 DOES NOT EXIST; PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE FACTS ESTABLISHING A BASIS FOR A CLAIM OF NUISANCE. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA LUZI et al VS. 1905 LAGUNA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOMERS' et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike The Prayer For Punitive Damages,Allegations Concerning Punitive Damages, Property Damage Allegations, Bodily Injury Allegation And Prayer For General Damages
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MAY 21, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANTS MARK TANGARD AND JOHN KEATING'S MOTION To Strike The Prayer For Punitive Damages, Allegations Concerning Punitive Damages, Property Damage Allegations, Bodily Injury Allegation And Prayer For General Damages: SUSTAIN EACH OF THE GROUNDS ALLEGED. STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ARGUMENT IS NOT CONTROLLING. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE FACTS ESTABLISHING BODILY INJURY TO SUPPORT A CLAIM FOR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. SEE MERCADO VERSUS LEONG (1996) 43 CAL. APP. 4TH 317, 324. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: ARTHUR ZIEF VS. LUIGI FORGIONE et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MAY 21, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANT LUIGI FORGIONE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1161(2) IS NOT LIMITED TO "RENT". CANOL-RANDOLPH ANAHEIM INC. VERSUS WILKOSKI 78 CAL. APP. 3D 477, 492. THE NOTICE WAS PROPER. BEVILL VERSUS ZOURA (1994) 27 CAL. APP. 4TH 694, 697. =(302/PJM/PB)
